title: RLM (Resonance-Lattice Module) Integration
content:
RLM is a BioCAPT module for detecting aether resonances.

Integration status:
- RLM module code written
- HMC capacity: 20,000 traces
- Rust HMC encode: 2.9 µs (vs. Python 9.5 µs — 3.3x faster)
- CAPTCore init: ~745 ms (82-module stack)

Next: Test RLM with aether research queries. Validate resonance detection.
